clauses.title: Parties
clauses.text: This Agreement is between Genpact LLC and Acme Corporation.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement with 30 days written notice.

clauses.title: Payment Terms
clauses.text: No fees are due under this NDA, and any approved invoices are payable net 30.

clauses.title: Liability Cap
clauses.text: Each party's aggregate liability is capped at 100000 USD.

clauses.title: Indemnity
clauses.text: Each party shall indemnify the other for third-party claims caused by breach.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of Delaware, USA.

clauses.title: Auto-Renewal
clauses.text: This Agreement does not auto-renew after expiration.

clauses.title: Data Protection
clauses.text: Each party shall comply with applicable data protection and privacy laws.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party shall protect Confidential Information and use it only for Project Alpha.
